summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Apple-inspired UI/UX redesign. All frontend pages render correctly without errors. Backend APIs remain fully functional (12/12 tests passed). Design system implemented successfully with glassmorphism, Inter font, pill buttons, and subtle shadows.
seed_data_creation: Created student session for test.student.new@example.com user
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX redesign complete and verified. All Apple Human Interface design elements implemented: Inter font, glassmorphism navigation, apple-card components, pill buttons, subtle shadows (shadow-apple), and stagger animations. Backend unchanged - all APIs working correctly.

landing_page.details: Hero section with 'Learn the Quran' heading, glass navbar with backdrop-blur, Login/SignUp buttons with data-testid

auth_page.details: Split layout with left green branding panel, right login form with Email/Password fields, 'Log In' button, 'Continue with Google' button, 'Sign up' link navigates to /onboarding

onboarding_page.details: Clean 3-question flow with option cards (Student/Parent/Teacher), progress indicator, data-testid on option buttons

admin_dashboard.details: Glassmorphism segmented control nav tabs (Overview, Approvals, Users, Bookings, Withdrawals, Subscriptions, Finance, Support), KPI cards with apple-card styling, charts, data-testid on all tabs

student_dashboard.details: Apple-style sidebar with Dashboard/My Schedule/Wallet/Account tabs (all with data-testid), glassmorphism header, mobile bottom tab bar working, Log Out button at bottom

backend_apis.details: GET /api/admin/stats, GET /api/admin/revenue/recognition, GET /api/admin/wallet/liability, GET /api/commission/admin/summary, GET /api/teachers - all returning correct data

design_elements_verified.inter_font: VERIFIED - Font family in index.css body
design_elements_verified.glassmorphism: VERIFIED - backdrop-blur-xl on navbars and sidebars
design_elements_verified.apple_card: VERIFIED - apple-card class with shadow-apple and rounded corners
